title: Skills Lockfile
description: Project-local lockfile (./skills-lock.json). Records project-scoped installs so `skills install` can reproduce them on a fresh checkout. Upper-compatible with vercel-labs/skills' skills-lock.json: same top-level shape and field names, plus optional `commit` and `agents`.

skills.description: Map of skill name to lock entry.

source.description: Round-trippable source string: owner/repo[/sub_path] for GitHub, full URL for other git remotes, or absolute path for local sources.

ref.description: Branch, tag, or commit hash. Omitted/null means the default branch was used.

sourceType.description: How `source` should be resolved at install time.

commit.description: Full commit SHA resolved at install time (null for local sources).

agents.description: Agent names this skill is wired into.

computedHash.description: Reserved for future content-addressed verification. Currently unused by the Rust port.
